title: Search for volunteer opportunities in San Francisco, CA
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the volunteer opportunity search screen. | Enter 'San Francisco, CA' in the search bar. | Press the search button to initiate the search.
expected_result: Search results for volunteer opportunities in San Francisco, CA should be displayed.

title: Search for volunteer opportunities using the 'near me' option
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the volunteer opportunity search screen. | Tap on the 'near me' button. | Press the search button to initiate the search.
expected_result: Search results for volunteer opportunities near the user's location should be displayed.

title: Search for volunteer opportunities using the 'advanced search' option
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the volunteer opportunity search screen. | Tap on the 'advanced search' button. | Enter search criteria and press the search button to initiate the search.
expected_result: Search results for volunteer opportunities matching the advanced search criteria should be displayed.

title: Search for volunteer opportunities with an invalid location
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the volunteer opportunity search screen. | Enter 'Invalid City, CA' in the search bar. | Press the search button to initiate the search.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the location is invalid.

title: Search for volunteer opportunities with an empty search bar
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the volunteer opportunity search screen. | Enter an empty string in the search bar. | Press the search button to initiate the search.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the search bar is empty.

title: Search for volunteer opportunities with special characters in the search bar
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the volunteer opportunity search screen. | Enter '!@#$%^&*()' in the search bar. | Press the search button to initiate the search.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the search bar contains invalid characters.

title: Search for volunteer opportunities with numbers in the search bar
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the volunteer opportunity search screen. | Enter '1234567890' in the search bar. | Press the search button to initiate the search.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the search bar contains invalid characters.

title: Search for volunteer opportunities with special characters in the search bar
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the volunteer opportunity search screen. | Enter '!@#$%^&*()' in the search bar. | Press the search button to initiate the search.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the search bar contains invalid characters.
